Line_References: Two pytest scripts for data pipeline testing with different business domains. PySpark_Unit_Testing focuses on transaction/account data processing with 7 test cases, while PNP_ACH_Testing focuses on entity classification pipeline with 11 test cases. Both demonstrate solid pytest structure and PySpark usage patterns.

Details: Both scripts test data processing pipelines but serve different business purposes. PySpark_Unit_Testing validates transaction filtering, joining, and aggregation operations, while PNP_ACH_Testing focuses on entity classification, regex pattern matching, and audit logging. The core intent of pipeline testing overlaps, but the specific business logic and data transformations differ significantly.

Both follow identical pytest organizational patterns with session-scoped fixtures, helper functions for DataFrame creation, and systematic test method naming (test_TC##_description). PySpark_Unit_Testing has simpler structure with 7 test cases, while PNP_ACH_Testing includes more complex mocking and 11 test cases. Both use proper imports, fixtures, and test isolation patterns.
